title: Multiple Epics to one subitem task
excerpt: Currently, it’s not possible to add multiple epics to one sub-item, you can do it in a task but not in a subtask.

posts.author: RobbenR (RobbenR)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently, it’s not possible to add multiple epics to one sub-item, you can do it in a task but not in a subtask.
